mapper.insert: insert into app_orders (user_id, product_id, name, brand, image_url, quantity, unit_price, line_total, currency, energy_kcal, fat, saturated_fat, carbohydrates, sugars, fiber, proteins, salt, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{imageUrl}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{lineTotal}, #{currency}, #{energyKcal}, #{fat}, #{saturatedFat}, #{carbohydrates}, #{sugars}, #{fiber}, #{proteins}, #{salt}, #{createdAt}) on duplicate key update name = values(name), brand = values(brand), image_url = values(image_url), quantity = values(quantity), unit_price = values(unit_price), line_total = values(line_total), currency = values(currency), energy_kcal = values(energy_kcal), fat = values(fat), saturated_fat = values(saturated_fat), carbohydrates = values(carbohydrates), sugars = values(sugars), fiber = values(fiber), proteins = values(proteins), salt = values(salt)
mapper.select: select o.order_id, o.user_id, o.product_id, o.quantity, o.unit_price, o.line_total, o.currency, o.created_at, coalesce(p.name, o.name) as name, coalesce(p.brand, o.brand) as brand, coalesce(p.image_url, o.image_url) as image_url, coalesce(p.energy_kcal, o.energy_kcal) as energy_kcal, coalesce(p.fat, o.fat) as fat, coalesce(p.saturated_fat, o.saturated_fat) as saturated_fat, coalesce(p.carbohydrates, o.carbohydrates) as carbohydrates, coalesce(p.sugars, o.sugars) as sugars, coalesce(p.fiber, o.fiber) as fiber, coalesce(p.proteins, o.proteins) as proteins, coalesce(p.salt, o.salt) as salt from app_orders o left join app_products p on o.product_id = p.product_id where o.user_id = #{userId} order by o.created_at desc
